message:
🌱 Add kube-vip: Upgrade to 0.8.5 results in invalid memory/nil pointer error mission (#952)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kube-vip-982-upgrade-to-0-8-5-results-in-invalid-memory-nil-pointer-error",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kube-vip: Upgrade to 0.8.5 results in invalid memory/nil pointer error",
+    "description": "Upgrade to 0.8.5 results in invalid memory/nil pointer error. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kube-vip troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kube-vip deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kube-vip -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kube-vip
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kube-vip -n kube-vip --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `"invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference" (runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference)`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kube-vip configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kube-vip configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kube-vip -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kube-vip
kubectl get configmap -n kube-vip -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kube-vip
```
After the upgrade from `0.8.4` -> `0.8.5` I now get an error when running kube-vip. 

This is running on a Raspberry Pi 5 (8GB) in a k3s cluster."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Upgrade to 0.8.5 results in invalid memory/nil pointer error",
+        "description": "could you try this image?

```
ghcr.io/cellebyte/kube-vip:v0.8.5-hotfix.0
```
or you can wait for the nightly build of the `main` branch.
```yaml
env:
        - name: address
          value: 192.168.6.40
        - name: vip_arp
          value: "true"
        - name: lb_enable
          value: "true"
        - name: port
          value: "6443"
        - name: vip_cidr
          value: "32"
        - name: cp_enable
          value: "true"
        - name: cp_namespace
          value: kube-system
        - name: vip_ddns
          value: "false"
        - name: svc_enable
          value: "false"
        - name: vip_leaderelection
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_leaseduration
          value: "15"
        - name: vip_renewd
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Upgrade to 0.8.5 results in invalid memory/nil… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kube-vip -n kube-vip --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kube-vip --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `"invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference" (runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference)` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "could you try this image?

```
ghcr.io/cellebyte/kube-vip:v0.8.5-hotfix.0
```
or you can wait for the nightly build of the `main` branch.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "env:
        - name: address
          value: 192.168.6.40
        - name: vip_arp
          value: "true"
        - name: lb_enable
          value: "true"
        - name: port
          value: "6443"
        - name: vip_cidr
          value: "32"
        - name: cp_enable
          value: "true"
        - name: cp_namespace
          value: kube-system
        - name: vip_ddns
          value: "false"
        - name: svc_enable
          value: "false"
        - name: vip_leaderelection
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_leaseduration
          value: "15"
        - name: vip_renewdeadline
          value: "10"
        - name: vip_retryperiod
          value: "2"
        - name: prometheus_server
          value: :2112",
+        "ghcr.io/cellebyte/kube-vip:v0.8.5-hotfix.0",
+        "> ghcr.io/cellebyte/kube-vip:v0.8.5-hotfix.0
>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
